completed.details: Changed 'across out site' to 'across our site' in the description field

completed.description: Hidden 'Product Rating Count' filter from collection pages
completed.details: Added hidden_filter_labels variable and continue conditions to skip rendering the 'Product Rating Count' filter in both desktop sidebar and mobile drawer filter panels
Modified showEmpty() to hide the entire section container (display:none) instead of showing a placeholder message, preventing wasted vertical space on first visits

completed.description: Fixed mobile sticky filter button overlapping product cards
completed.details: Added padding-bottom to mobile product grid to clear the fixed floating filter button so last-row cards are not obscured

completed.description: Standardised cart quantity button styling across breakpoints
completed.details: Added explicit mobile media query to reinforce the outlined quantity button style (light bg, visible border), matching the desktop appearance

completed.description: Fixed SAVE ribbon clipping on hero promo cards
completed.details: Adjusted ribbon right offset and padding for both desktop and mobile breakpoints so the diagonal ribbon is no longer clipped by overflow:hidden

skipped.description: Breadcrumb vs product title dash inconsistency
skipped.reason: Breadcrumb uses {{ product.title | truncate: 50 }} with no character transformation. Both breadcrumb and heading pull from product.title. The en-dash vs hyphen inconsistency is in the product data itself — this is a Shopify admin data fix.
Shopify admin data fix, not a theme code issue

CSS already applies uniform object-fit:cover and aspect-ratio via --inv-cat-image-ratio. The visual inconsistency is in the source images themselves — this is a Shopify admin content fix (images need to be re-shot/cropped consistently).

The bottom navigation bar with four icons (Shop All, Trade, Categories, Contact) described in the bug does not exist in the current theme codebase. The mobile drawer renders nav items as a vertical list from the configured menu. This component may have been part of the Trade base theme or was removed during the cleanup. Needs further investigation.

needs_admin_action.description: Breadcrumb shows hyphen while heading shows en-dash on product pages
needs_admin_action.action: Check product titles in Shopify admin. Standardise on en-dash (' – ') in all product titles that have brand/model separators (e.g. 'Makita GA9090N – 230mm Angle Grinder 2200W 110V'). The breadcrumb and heading both pull from product.title so fixing the data fixes both.

needs_admin_action.description: A product in Power Tools collection has product type 'cha'
needs_admin_action.action: Find the product in Shopify admin and correct its Product Type field to the full intended value.

needs_admin_action.description: Category grid card images are inconsistently cropped
needs_admin_action.action: Replace the six homepage category card images with consistently shot/cropped images. The CSS already applies uniform object-fit:cover and aspect-ratio — the source images need to be visually consistent.

needs_admin_action.description: Mobile menu 'Contact' label truncation — component not found in theme code
needs_admin_action.action: Investigate whether a mobile bottom navigation bar exists via Shopify theme editor settings, a third-party app, or if this was removed during the recent cleanup. If it's an app or theme editor configuration, adjust the label or container width there.
